title: DEQ, Tachyons, Photons, Paraparticles, antimatter, matter, Pre-Biotic Temporal Structures and Spacetime Geometry
author: Morató de Dalmases, Luis
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
1. Protocol for Photon Generation from Dark Energy  
   Author:  Luis Morató de Dalmases  
  File:  1. Protocol for Photon Generation from Dark Energy.pdf   
  Resum :  This article presents a pioneering protocol for converting  Dark Energy Quasiparticles (DEQ)  into real  photons , via  Rs-resonant excitation  and precise  phase-locking techniques . The work is grounded in reinterpreted Bose-Einstein statistics and chronionic dynamics, and inspired by findings from RHIC, CERN, and LANL.  
  License : Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC-BY 4.0)  (Attribution - NonCommercial - ShareAlike)  
  2. Fron phtons to DEQ  
   Author:  Luis Morató de Dalmases  
  File:  2. Fron phtons to DEQ.pdf   
  Resum :  The question of whether photons and dark energy quasiparticles (DEQs) share a common statistical nature lies at the heart of Time Theory, a speculative framework developed by the CronNet–Holo Initiative. By reinterpreting the Bose-Einstein distribution through Rs-space and chronion physics, we propose that both photons and DEQs are bosonic structures within a temporal flux, differentiated only by their resonant frequencies, chemical potentials, and origins in Rs-space geometry  
  License : Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC-BY 4.0)  (Attribution - NonCommercial - ShareAlike)  
  3. Protocol for DEQ → Tachyons → Paraparticles: A  Symmetry-Breaking Approach in Time Theory  
   Author:  Luis Morató de Dalmases  
  File:  3.Protocol for DEQ → Tachyons → Paraparticles.pdf   
  Resum :  We present a protocol for generating paraparticles from Dark Energy Quasi particles (DEQ), rooted in the Time Theory framework. This process involves the  controlled rupture of Rs-coherence at bifurcation points Z0 via non-linear chronionic interference. Through torsional fields, Rs-chaotic modulation, and phase  destabilization, stationary DEQ entities transition into paraparticle pairs with exotic spin configurations. The resulting paraparticles could enable novel applications  in chiral matter formation, quantum temporal computing, and deep-time probing technologies.  
  License : Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC-BY 4.0)  (Attribution - NonCommercial - ShareAlike)  
  4. Protocol for Controlled Deceleration of Tachyons into Photons with Plasmoide Integration within the Time Theory Framework  
   Author:  Luis Morató de Dalmases  
  File:  4.Protocol for Controlled Deceleration of Tachyons .pdf   
  Resum :  Within the framework of the Theory of Time, we propose a radical experimental protocol: Generating photons from tachyons through controlled deceleration inside a plasmoid. This suggests that light can emerge directly from temporal energy, not just from atomic or material transitions.  
  License : Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC-BY 4.0)  (Attribution - NonCommercial - ShareAlike)  
  5. The Temporal Mirror: Protocol Generating Antimatter through Inverted Rs-Phase Collapse within the Time  Theory Framework  
   Author:  Luis Morató de Dalmases  
  File:  5. Generating Antimatter.pdf   
  Resum :  This paper presents a groundbreaking protocol for generating antimatter through the inverted collapse of the Rs-phase within the Time Theory framework, redefining antimatter as a temporal phenomenon rather than a product of particle-antiparticle pair production.  
  License : Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC-BY 4.0)  (Attribution - NonCommercial - ShareAlike)  
  6. Protocol:  Fractal Synchronization of Rs-Space as a Generator of Pre-Biotic Temporal Structures   
   Author:  Luis Morató de Dalmases  
  File:  6. Generator of  Pre-Biotic Temporal Structures.pdf   
  Resum :  We propose a novel protocol within the Time Theory framework to induce self organized, coherent temporal structures with pre-biotic properties, termed Chronoid Vital Pre-Biotic (CVP) entities. By leveraging fractal synchronization of multiple Rs-phase signals derived from Riemann zeta zeroes, the protocol generates stable, chiral, and responsive temporal structures in a plasmoid-confined Rs-space.  
  License : Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC-BY 4.0)  (Attribution - NonCommercial - ShareAlike)  
  7. Emergence of Spacetime Geometry from Rs-Coherence: Protocol for Temporal Genesis of Space   
   Author:  Luis Morató de Dalmases  
  File:  7. protocol for Temporal Genesis of Space.pdf   
  Resum :  We propose a novel protocol within the Time Theory framework to generate observable and measurable spacetime geometry through Rs-phase coherent fields and fractal synchronization of chronions. By leveraging Rs-space dynamics, we induce an emergent spacetime metric (gµν) via a temporal stress tensor (Hµν), validated through computational simulations.   
  License : Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC-BY 4.0)  (Attribution - NonCommercial - ShareAlike)  
  8. Protocol for Matter Generation from Rs-Coherent Photons via Temporal Resonance   
   Author:  Luis Morató de Dalmases  
  File:  8. Protocol for Matter Generation from Rs-Coherent.pdf   
  Resum :  This protocol demonstrates matter generation from Rs-coherent photons through fractal resonance and interference at Z0 points, where spatial (S2) and temporal (T−3) manifolds converge. Building on prior works, we propose a transformative approach to matter creation, validated through simulations and experimental detection, with implications for cosmology and technology.   
  License : Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC-BY 4.0)  (Attribution - NonCommercial - ShareAlike)
